response.justification: Despite a strong background in full-stack development and diverse technical experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native platform design as required for the role; their recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or industrial IoT protocols essential to the position.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems via GISCollective and DLang projects.
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and promoting TDD/coding standards across teams.
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across web, embedded, and mobile platforms with high ownership.
concerns: No demonstrable C++ or STL experience in professional contexts beyond a 1-year role 10+ years ago.
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, REST in automation contexts, or on-prem/cloud hybrid platforms.
Career gap and recent focus on non-core technologies (TypeScript, DLang) suggest misalignment with C++-centric senior role requirements.
